progress_zero: Your journey starts here. Choose your first module!

js_execution.title: Drag & Drop JS Execution
js_execution.description: An interactive learning component that tests understanding of JavaScript execution order through a drag-and-drop interface.

js_stack.title: Stack
js_stack.description: An interactive widget that demonstrates two fundamental data structures: Stack (LIFO - Last In, First Out) and Queue (FIFO - First In, First Out)

fill_blanks.title: Fill in the Blanks
fill_blanks.description: Complete statements about the given code by filling in the missing parts.

ai_interviewer.title: AI Interviewer
ai_interviewer.description: Practice technical interviews with an AI-powered interviewer. Get questions, instant feedback, and track your readiness across topics using Teacher and AI Simulation modes.
